stories.title: 标签眼镜
stories.description: Special glasses show floating labels above objects revealing what they're thinking. A person discovers that everything has a story and learns to appreciate ordinary objects more.

stories.title: 进城 - 1985
stories.description: A young person's first time arriving in Reform-era Beijing, experiencing the overwhelming transition from countryside to city life in 1985.

stories.title: 诚实的自行车
stories.description: A magical bicycle that only moves when its rider tells it true stories. The protagonist learns the value of honesty through their unique relationship with the bike.

stories.title: 错误的手机
stories.description: Two people with the same name accidentally swap identical phones, leading to hilarious confusion as they receive each other's calls and messages.

stories.title: 阳台花园
stories.description: An elderly neighbor teaches a stressed young person about gardening and life lessons through the seasons of planting and growth on a balcony garden.
